---
format:
  html:
    theme: darkly
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

<style>
.hero {
  min-height: 85vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: #000;
  padding: 2rem;
}

.hero img {
  width: min(95vw, 1400px);
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}
</style>

::: {.hero}
![](Logos/ct_homepage.png)
:::
